evals.prompt: Create an AGENTS.md for a TypeScript monorepo with npm workspaces
evals.expected_output: Tiered AGENTS.md with named constants, quality gate, and development workflow

evals.prompt: Review this AGENTS.md and identify missing best practices
evals.expected_output: Gap analysis with specific recommendations for improvement

evals.prompt: Add a pre-existing issues policy and atomic commit rules to AGENTS.md
evals.expected_output: Updated AGENTS.md with issue resolution and commit workflow sections
